creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
This PR is very light on details: where, when? Closing as "insufficient information".

There has been some upheaval around xslt recently, but xmlsec1 was bumped (PORTREVISION) to pick up new libxml2, and there was a bump in libxslt as well. The ICU update bumped libxml2 and libxslt, so there's not much to do here (except maybe "bump transitively"? I don't know, that seems excessive).

You may need to clean / build again.
